positive: A stylized illustration of a glowing, mystical forest scene, viewed through a clean, geometric silhouette portal. The main subject is a wise, ethereal owl perched on a mossy branch, surrounded by luminous, bioluminescent flora and intricate vine patterns. The style should be highly detailed digital line art mixed with vibrant watercolor washes, utilizing deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of neon teal for contrast. Focus on strong symmetry and clean separation between the foreground and background elements, ensuring maximum readability and impact when printed on fabric. Vector-like clean lines are critical. Central composition, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blurry, grain, noise, text, watermark, low detail, poor anatomy, artifacts, logos, signature, cropped, out of frame, ugly, dirty, messy
